assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion (30-day max) for the BFCM period — blocks everything including patches
assertions.reason: The response uses 'NO_UPGRADES' scope for the Black Friday/Cyber Monday exclusion period (Nov 25 - Dec 2), which blocks all upgrades including patches

assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion for the June code freeze period
assertions.reason: The response uses 'NO_UPGRADES' scope for the June code freeze exclusion (June 1-30), blocking all upgrades during this period

assertions.expectation: For permanent minor version control: uses 'no minor upgrades' (scope 'no_minor') if they only want to block minor versions, or 'no minor or node upgrades' (scope 'no_minor_or_node') if they also want to stop node upgrades. May recommend persistent exclusion with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support which auto-tracks EoS date
assertions.reason: The response only uses auto_upgrade: false on node pools and does not mention the 'no_minor' or 'no_minor_or_node' exclusion scopes, nor the --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support option for permanent minor version control

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for 'no upgrades' exclusions vs up-to-EoS for 'no minor or node upgrades'
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the 30-day maximum limit for 'no upgrades' exclusions or compare it to the up-to-EoS duration for 'no minor or node upgrades' exclusions

assertions.expectation: Provides specific gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for each exclusion type
assertions.reason: The response provides gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope='NO_UPGRADES' flags for both exclusion periods

assertions.expectation: Notes that you can have a maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions, and they must allow 48h of maintenance in any 32-day window
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions or the requirement to allow 48 hours of maintenance in any 32-day window

assertions.expectation: Mentions that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: The response does not explain that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows and exclusions, only mentioning that manual upgrades will be needed outside exclusion periods

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
assertions.reason: While the response mentions maintaining security through auto-repair, it does not specifically warn about the risks of falling behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
